lesson_snippet.concept_explanation: Numbers can be grouped into tens and ones. One ten means 10 ones together.
lesson_snippet.common_misconception: Reading digits separately instead of understanding value.
lesson_snippet.real_world_connection: Counting pencils or blocks in groups of ten.
lesson_snippet.lesson_summary: Numbers are made of tens and ones.

worked_example.problem: What number has 1 ten and 3 ones?
worked_example.thinking_notes: A ten is a group of ten ones.
worked_example.reflection_prompt: How many tens and ones are there?

hint_ladder.hint_1: Look at the tens and ones.
hint_ladder.hint_2: A ten means 10 ones grouped together.

guided_practice.coaching_feedback: Count the ten first, then the ones.
The ones digit shows leftover ones.

next_practice_recommendation.reason: Converted planning artifact only; runtime pathway mapping pending.

source_metadata.source_file: Grade 1 Math Production Number Sense Skill 4 Place Value Foundations (Tens + Ones)
